response:
The name of Juan Manuel Márquez's WBO champion holding younger brother is **Rafael Márquez**.

**Reasoning**:  
- Juan Manuel Márquez is the younger brother of Rafael Márquez.  
- Rafael Márquez is a professional boxer who held the WBO featherweight title.  
- He is also a two-time world champion in two weight classes, including the WBO featherweight title.  
- This makes Rafael Márquez the WBO champion holding Juan Manuel Márquez as his younger brother.
